titleStmt.title: SII 17.127: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 127. (A.R. No. 109 of 1904.) TIRUCHCHŌPURAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Maṅgaḷapurīśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., Vṛiśchika śu 10, Saturday, śōti (svāti) are irregular. Palaeographically this inscription may be assigned to the 13th century.

It records the gift of ten vēlis of wet (nañjai) lands in the village of Tyāgavalli in the Tyāgavalli-ppaṟṟu alias Āṇḍāgaḷūr-ppaṟṟu in the eastern division of Mēṟkā-nāḍu in the Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu by the king for offerings on the occasion of Sundarapāṇḍiyaṉ sandhi instituted after his name besides other services including festivals and repairs The land which is stated to have been formerly a taxable tirunāmattukkāṇi was made free of a number of taxes and levies mentioned in the inscription. Neṭṭūruḍaiyāṉ Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ Kāliṅgarāyaṉ figures as one of the signatories of the document.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ—
śrīmeṟkittikkumelRead ‘meykkīrttikku mel’•
tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti
koṉerimelkoṇ
ṭāṉ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyate
vaṟkku yāṇṭu patiṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ
Etirāmāṇṭu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu pū
rvvapakṣattu daśamiyum śanikkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa cotināḷ Irājādhi
rājavaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu kiḻva
ḻi tiyākavallippaṟṟāṉa Āṇṭākaḷu
rppaṟṟil tiyākavalli Uṭaiyār tiruccopu
ramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku
Iṉṉāyanārkku nam perāl kaṭṭiṉa cun
tarapāṇṭiyaṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum Amu
tupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nit
tanimantaṅkaḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalā
ka Iṉṉāyaṉār paḻantirunāmattukkāṇiyā
y Iṟaiyiṟ kūṭṭiṉa Ivvūr naṉcainila
m patiṟṟu veliyum nāṉkellaikkuṭpa
ṭṭa meṭun tiṭarum kāṭum kaḷarilum tirutti
ppayirc ceytukoḷḷalām nilamum pati
ṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kāttikaimā
ta mutal mutal Aṭaṅka tirunāmattukkā
ṇi Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Iṉṉi
lattu kārum maṟuvum Orupūvum kaṭaippūvu
m karumpu ceṅkaḻunīr vāḻai Iñci mañca
ḷ teṅku kamuku palāmaram koḻuntu Uḷḷi
ṭṭa vāṉpayirum māṉavāri
puḻutinellum varaku keḻva
raku Eḷḷu vaḻutalai pākal Uḷḷi
ṭṭa puṉpayirum ceytukoḷvā
rkaḷākavum Iṉṉilattāl varu
m neṟkaṭamai kācukaṭamai māvaṭai
kuḷavaṭai nirāṇi puṉpayirkkaṭamai
poṉvari Antarāyam kāṇikkai kā
ttikaippaccai Apiṣeka kaikkāṇi
tulāpāravari pañcipili cantivikkirama
peṟu kiṟṟuvari vācalviṉiyokam ciṟaiaccu Ilāñ
ciṉaippeṟu Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti Āṇṭeḻu
ttu tevai veṭṭi nilai Āḷ paṇikkottu pā
ṭikāval tevai Āḷamañci kūṟṟilakkai
kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai cīkāriyap peṟu nāṭṭuvi
ṉiyokam Uḷpaṭṭa Aṉaittu Upātikaḷum Ivvū
r nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa ceṭṭiṟai taṟiyiṟai Aḻuka
lcarakku Āyam vālamañcāṭi taṭṭoli taṭṭārappā
ṭṭam kāṭu kāval cirukaṭai yīḻampuṉcai cekkiṟai
makammai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Upāti Uḷpa
ṭa mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka variyilum kaḻittom
Ippaṭikku Inta Olaiye cātaṉamāka koṇṭu cantirā
yittavaraiyum celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭ
ṭikkoṇṭu pūcaiyum tiruppaṇiyum tirunāḷum tāḻva
ṟa naṭatti potuka tulyam Ivai neṭṭuru ṭaiyāṉ Iḷai
yāḻvāṉ kāliṅkarāyaḷ Eḻuttu Ivai neṭṭuruṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.127 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
